name: Coconut-Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over low heat.
2. Add the chopped coconut to the melted butter and stir constantly until golden brown.
3. Spread the coconut on a plate lined with parchment paper to cool completely.
4. In a large bowl, beat together the remaining 2 tablespoons butter and cream cheese until smooth.
5. Gradually add milk and confectioners sugar to the mixture, beating until well combined.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Fold in 1 3/4 cups of the cooled coconut into the frosting.
8. Spread the frosting on the tops of cake layers.
9. Stack the cake layers and sprinkle with the remaining coconut.
